extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked inside 10km on Sarnano Sassotetto, dropped WOODS who cracked spectacularly, soloed 35 seconds clear of THOMAS.
tactical_patterns: BRAMBIA's early surprise attack inside 10km forced YATES to counter, disrupting team-controlled tempo before steepest gradients.
VLASOV abandoned WOODS despite same team, prioritizing own GC over defending leader's jersey in final 3km.
YATES attacked with 3km remaining before gradient eased, exploiting narrow window where sustained power matters most.
MASNADA covered BRAMBIA as second Italian, revealing Italian teams coordinating disruption despite different sponsors.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: catastrophic implosion on final climb losing 54 seconds, team abandoned him as VLASOV attacked away
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked knowing from previous day he had superior legs, tactical confidence indicator before move
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: made independent GC decision abandoning struggling team leader WOODS, net 5-second gain justified betrayal
rider_signals.BRAMBIA Gianluca: neutral: early attack inside 10km forced pace disruption but lacked power to sustain with YATES
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: neutral: covered fellow Italian BRAMBIA rather than marking YATES, Italian coordination over team orders
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: sprinted for bonus seconds despite chasing effort, professional discipline stealing 4 seconds from MICA
